title: Recorded Future Entity Enrichment
content:
Template playbook to incorporate Recorded Future enrichment for IPs, Hashes, Domains, URLs into your current workflows. Playbook also shows how to look up available 'Links' data for IOCs.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Inputs — MD5: File MD5 hash to enrich.; SHA256: The file SHA256 hash to enrich.; SHA1: The file SHA1 hash to enrich.; IP: The IP Address to enrich.; Domain: The Domain name to enrich.; URL: The URL to enrich..

Outputs — DBotScore.Indicator: The indicator that was tested.; DBotScore.Type: The indicator type.; DBotScore: The DBotScore object.; DBotScore.Vendor: Vendor used to calculate the score.; DBotScore.Score: The actual score..

Integrations/scripts used: Recorded Future v2.

                      - - operator: containsString

                          right:
                            value:

                          right:
                            value:
                              simple: active
                    accessor: brand

inputs:
  - key: MD5
    value:
      complex:
        root: File
        accessor: MD5
        transformers:
          - operator: uniq
    required: false
    description: File MD5 hash to enrich.
    playbookInputQuery: null
  - key: SHA256
    value:
